Think about it, close five. I understand you want to add some time to this and as a consumer myself, I have said exactly the same thing at exactly this time. And here's the reality. When I was in that situation, there was a couple things going on for me. Okay? Number one, I wasn't yet on the right product and did not want to tell the salesperson. Number two, maybe the money was right, the terms weren't right, the condition wasn't and I didn't want to tell the salesperson. Or three, there was some other concerns that still hadn't been addressed. Let me ask you, which one's going on for you right now?
